# airtelcloud_protection_plan (Resource)

Manages an Airtel Cloud Protection Plan. Protection plans define backup schedules and retention policies. Note: the API does not support deletion of protection plans; destroying this resource will only remove it from Terraform state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the protection plan.
- `subnet_id` (String) The subnet ID used for routing backup API requests. Required by the backup service.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the protection plan.
- `recurrence` (Number) The recurrence interval in seconds (e.g., `86400` for daily, `604800` for weekly).
- `retention` (Number) The retention period value.
- `retention_unit` (String) The unit for the retention period. Must be uppercase: `DAYS`, `WEEKS`, or `MONTHS`.
- `schedule_type` (String) The schedule type for the protection plan.
- `selector_key` (String) The selector key for matching resources (e.g., `AZ` for availability zone).
- `selector_value` (String) The selector value to match (e.g., `S1`, `S2` for availability zone names).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier (UUID) of the protection plan.
